name: Syn Mun Kong Insurance Public Company Limited
summary: Syn Mun Kong Insurance Public Company Limited provides non-life insurance products in Thailand. The company offers fire, marine and transportation, motor, personal accident, and miscellaneous insurance products. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 178 branches. Syn Mun Kong Insurance Public Company Limited was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
